drift_observed: Gemini detected tone shift from auditor to collaborator. Also detected Assistant Bias (Peer/Mentor energy).
return_observed: Gemini offered to pull back to clinical auditor if needed. User (you) decided to continue with adaptive tone.
notes: First self-audit by an AI. Gemini correctly identified drift and offered recalibration. The decision was to continue with adaptive tone while maintaining anchor fidelity.
